title: vitis labrusca f. aestivalis
intro: Vitis labrusca f. aestivalis, also known as the fox grape or summer grape, is a variety of the American grapevine species Vitis labrusca, native to eastern North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which can be used to treat various health issues such as wounds, fever, and digestive problems. The medicinal properties of Vitis labrusca f. aestivalis also offer health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is also used in traditional folk medicine to treat various conditions, including sore throats and colds.
